narratives.Overview: Anywhere (@visionik/anywhere) is a cross-platform TypeScript library that normalizes GPS/location data from multiple heterogeneous sources into a single consistent Position interface. Targets browser (W3C Geolocation), Node.js (GDL-90 UDP, NMEA serial/UDP/TCP/BT/file), and native runtimes via Capacitor/Electron in future versions.
narratives.Architecture: source → manager → consumer pipeline. LocationSource subclasses emit normalized Position objects to a central LocationManager, which applies configurable priority ordering, hysteresis, and fallback logic before emitting to consumers via a typed micro-emitter. Dual ESM+CJS output via tsup. Runtime deps: serialport (serial transport only).
narratives.Decisions: Event API: custom typed micro-emitter (zero deps). Module: dual ESM+CJS. NMEA transports: all (UDP, Serial, TCP, BT, File). SimulatorSource: v0.1. Offline behavior: configurable (offline-event / auto-retry / stale-position). Package: @visionik/anywhere. Runtime: Node 18+ / Chrome 90+. DeviceLocationSource v0.1: browser W3C only. Fusion: deferred to v0.2, architecture planned.

subItems.title: Subphase 1.1: Project Setup
Initialize package.json with @visionik/anywhere, exports map, dual CJS+ESM fields

narrative.Acceptance: package.json present with name, version 0.1.0, exports map for . (ESM+CJS+types), peerDeps, and engines fields

subItems.title: Configure tsconfig.json (strict, ES2020, composite, declaration)

narrative.Acceptance: tsc --noEmit succeeds on empty src/index.ts with strict mode enabled

subItems.title: Configure tsup (dual ESM+CJS output, .d.ts generation, sourcemaps)

narrative.Acceptance: task build produces dist/index.js (CJS), dist/index.mjs (ESM), and dist/index.d.ts

subItems.title: Set up Vitest with v8 coverage provider

narrative.Acceptance: task test:coverage runs and reports coverage; threshold config set to 85%

subItems.title: Configure ESLint + Prettier with TypeScript rules

narrative.Acceptance: task lint runs clean on empty src/index.ts

subItems.title: Create Taskfile.yml with check, test, test:coverage, build, clean, lint tasks

narrative.Acceptance: task --list shows all tasks; task check runs lint + typecheck + test + coverage in sequence

subItems.title: Initialize CHANGELOG.md (Keep a Changelog format, [Unreleased] section)

narrative.Acceptance: CHANGELOG.md exists with [Unreleased] header and conventional-commits note

subItems.title: Create .gitignore and .npmignore

narrative.Acceptance: node_modules, dist, coverage excluded from git; only dist and types published to npm

subItems.title: Subphase 1.2: Core Types (depends on: 1.1)
Define Position interface (all fields from README spec)

narrative.Acceptance: Position interface exported from src/types/position.ts with all required and optional fields; JSDoc on each field

subItems.title: Define StatusEvent interface ({ connected: boolean; quality: number })

narrative.Acceptance: StatusEvent exported from src/types/status-event.ts

subItems.title: Implement TypedEmitter micro-emitter with generic event map

narrative.Acceptance: TypedEmitter<T> class implements on/off/emit with full TypeScript generics; ~20 lines; zero runtime deps

subItems.title: Define LocationSource abstract base class (start, stop, emitPosition, onPosition, onError, onStatus)

narrative.Acceptance: Abstract class exported; concrete subclass can be instantiated and emits positions; protected emitPosition calls onPosition callback

subItems.title: Tests for TypedEmitter and LocationSource base

narrative.Acceptance: on/off/emit, multiple listeners, listener removal, error propagation all covered; ≥85% branch coverage

subItems.title: Subphase 1.3: LocationManager (depends on: 1.2)
Implement LocationManager lifecycle: constructor, addSource, removeSource, start, stop

narrative.Acceptance: Manager starts/stops all registered sources; addSource/removeSource work at runtime; emits 'position' events via TypedEmitter

subItems.title: Implement priority engine: source selection by priorityOrder + fix quality + hysteresis

narrative.Acceptance: Given two SimulatorSources with different priorities, manager emits only from the higher-priority source; falls back when primary stops; hysteresisMs prevents oscillation

subItems.title: Implement configurable offline behavior (offlineBehavior: 'event' | 'retry' | 'stale')

narrative.Acceptance: event: emits offline event; retry: attempts source restart on interval; stale: emits last position with stale flag; all three modes tested

subItems.title: Tests for LocationManager (priority, fallback, offline modes, minUpdateIntervalMs)

narrative.Acceptance: Priority ordering, hysteresis, all three offline behaviors, rate limiting via minUpdateIntervalMs — all covered; ≥85% coverage

subItems.title: Subphase 2.1: DeviceLocationSource (depends on: 1.2)
Implement W3C navigator.geolocation wrapper (watchPosition + one-shot getCurrentPosition modes)

narrative.Acceptance: DeviceLocationSource starts watching on start(), stops on stop(); supports enableHighAccuracy, timeoutMs, maximumAgeMs options

subItems.title: Normalize GeolocationPosition to Position; emit onStatus with accuracy quality signal

narrative.Acceptance: All GeolocationCoordinates fields mapped to Position; source field set to 'device'; onStatus called with quality derived from accuracy

subItems.title: Tests for DeviceLocationSource (mock navigator.geolocation)

narrative.Acceptance: watchPosition mock emits positions; error path calls onError; stop() calls clearWatch; ≥85% coverage

subItems.title: Subphase 2.2: GDL90Source (depends on: 1.2)
UDP socket listener using Node.js dgram (bind, message handler, close)

narrative.Acceptance: GDL90Source binds to configurable port/address on start(), closes socket on stop(); onError called on socket errors

subItems.title: GDL-90 framing: 0x7E delimiter detection, byte unstuffing (0x7D XOR 0x20), CRC-16/CCITT validation

narrative.Acceptance: Valid GDL-90 frames decoded correctly; frames with invalid CRC discarded silently; byte-stuffed frames unstuffed before decode

subItems.title: Decode Heartbeat (0x00): GPS validity flags, UTC timestamp, update source status

narrative.Acceptance: Heartbeat parsed; onStatus called with connected=true when GPS valid bit set

subItems.title: Decode Ownship Report (0x0B): lat/lon (semicircles), geometric altitude, NACp, ground velocity, track

narrative.Acceptance: Position emitted with lat/lon in decimal degrees, altitude in meters, speed in m/s, heading in degrees true; source='gdl90'

subItems.title: Decode ForeFlight AHRS extension (0x65): roll, pitch, heading, yaw rate; annotate Position

narrative.Acceptance: When AHRS message received before ownship, roll/pitch/magneticVariation fields populated on next emitted Position

subItems.title: Tests for GDL90Source (mock dgram socket, pre-built binary datagrams)

narrative.Acceptance: Known-good GDL-90 packets produce expected Position values; CRC error path discards; AHRS fields appear on position; ≥85% coverage

subItems.title: Subphase 2.3: NMEASource (depends on: 1.2)
Core NMEA parser: line splitter, checksum validation (*XX), talker ID normalization (GP/GN/GL/GA)

narrative.Acceptance: Valid sentences pass; sentences with wrong checksum rejected; talker prefix stripped before type dispatch

subItems.title: Parse RMC: position, speed (knots→m/s), course, UTC time, status (A/V)

narrative.Acceptance: RMC with status A produces position, speed, heading, timestamp; status V marks fix as invalid

subItems.title: Parse GGA: position, MSL altitude, fix quality (0-8), satellite count

narrative.Acceptance: GGA altitude in meters; fix quality 0 marks no fix; satellite count mapped to Position.satellites

subItems.title: Parse VTG: true track, magnetic track, ground speed (knots→m/s)

narrative.Acceptance: True track mapped to heading; ground speed converted to m/s

subItems.title: Parse GSA: fix type (1/2/3), HDOP

narrative.Acceptance: fixType mapped from GSA mode (1=none, 2=2d, 3=3d); hdop populated

subItems.title: Parse GLL: lat/lon only

narrative.Acceptance: GLL produces position update with no altitude/speed fields set

subItems.title: Fix accumulator: merge sentences per epoch, emit on RMC (or GGA if no RMC)

narrative.Acceptance: RMC + GGA + GSA in same epoch merge into single Position emission; accumulator resets after emit

subItems.title: UDP transport (Node.js dgram)

narrative.Acceptance: NMEASource({ type: 'udp', port: 10110 }) binds and streams NMEA sentences to parser

subItems.title: TCP transport (Node.js net.Socket)

narrative.Acceptance: NMEASource({ type: 'tcp', host, port }) connects and streams data; reconnects on disconnect

subItems.title: Serial transport (serialport npm package)

narrative.Acceptance: NMEASource({ type: 'serial', path, baudRate }) opens port and streams via serialport; closes on stop()

subItems.title: Bluetooth transport (Node.js — best-effort via serial-over-BT or bt-serial)

narrative.Acceptance: NMEASource({ type: 'bluetooth', ... }) documented with platform caveats; falls back gracefully if BT unavailable

subItems.title: File replay transport (fs.createReadStream, line-by-line at configurable playback speed)

narrative.Acceptance: NMEASource({ type: 'file', path, rateMultiplier }) streams NMEA log file and emits positions at controlled rate

subItems.title: Tests for NMEASource (sentence parsing, accumulator, all transports mocked)

narrative.Acceptance: All 5 sentence types parse to correct Position fields; accumulator merge tested; transport error paths covered; ≥85% coverage

subItems.title: Subphase 2.4: SimulatorSource (depends on: 1.2)
Implement SimulatorSource: route array, configurable intervalMs, loop/once mode

narrative.Acceptance: SimulatorSource({ route, intervalMs, loop }) emits positions at interval; stops after last position when loop=false; restarts when loop=true

subItems.title: Tests for SimulatorSource

narrative.Acceptance: Route plays back at correct interval; loop behavior tested; stop() halts emission; ≥85% coverage

subItems.title: Subphase 3.1: Test Coverage (depends on: Phase 2)
Verify ≥85% coverage overall and per module; fill gaps

narrative.Acceptance: task test:coverage passes with all thresholds met; no module below 85%

subItems.title: Integration tests: LocationManager + SimulatorSource priority/fallback/offline scenarios

narrative.Acceptance: E2E test: two SimulatorSources with different priorities; primary stops → fallback promoted; offline behavior modes each tested end-to-end

subItems.title: Subphase 3.2: Package & Publish (depends on: 3.1)
Verify tsup output: ESM, CJS, and .d.ts all resolve correctly via exports map

narrative.Acceptance: require('@visionik/anywhere') and import '@visionik/anywhere' both resolve; types resolve in strict TypeScript consumer project

subItems.title: GitHub Actions workflow: npm publish on release tag push

narrative.Acceptance: .github/workflows/release.yml triggers on tag v*, runs task build, publishes to npm registry

subItems.title: Subphase 3.3: Documentation (depends on: Phase 2)
Add JSDoc comments to all public APIs

narrative.Acceptance: All exported classes, interfaces, methods, and options have @param/@returns/@example JSDoc; tsc --declaration produces useful .d.ts

subItems.title: Update README with final API reference and working code examples

narrative.Acceptance: README Getting Started section matches final package API exactly; examples are copy-paste runnable

subItems.title: Add CHANGELOG.md entries for v0.1.0 release

narrative.Acceptance: CHANGELOG.md has [0.1.0] section with Added entries for all v0.1 features; [Unreleased] section reset
